case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 0-180s metrics. Productcatalogservice shows rising latency.p50 (+1.2) and latency.p90 (+1.5). Currencyservice has latency.p50 dev=+1.3. Paymentservice latency spikes (+1.8). Root cause likely productcatalogservice latency.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 0-180s productcatalogservice metrics. Latency.p50/p90 dev=+1.2/+1.5 persist across windows. Traces show caller-driven load but no callee latency spikes. Root cause remains productcatalogservice latency.
